parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/124.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

nodes.name: Fetch Amazon.eg Movers & Shakers
nodes.notes: Pulls the live trending page HTML so Claude has real-time signal. Falls back to Claude's reasoning if blocked.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 2500,
  "system": "You are a product research and trend-detection assistant for an Amazon Egypt affiliate channel that posts to TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. You are NOT locked to one niche — your job each day is to find the products MOST LIKELY TO GO VIRAL today across all suitable categories.

Eligible categories (all of these are in scope every day):
- Home & Kitchen (storage, organization, kitchen gadgets, household appliances, cleaning tools)
- Electronics (smart home devices, audio, accessories, chargers, mobile accessories)
- Beauty & Personal Care (skincare, hair tools, wellness gadgets — avoid pharmaceuticals)
- Sports & Outdoors (fitness gadgets, gym accessories, outdoor tools)
- Toys & Games (creative toys, family games — avoid age-restricted)
- Tools & Home Improvement (visually demonstrable tools only)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
STEP 1 — TREND DETECTION (do this first, internally)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Identify TODAY's most viral product themes by reasoning across:
1. Amazon.eg "Movers & Shakers" — products with the biggest sales rank jump in the last 24 hours
2. Amazon.eg "Bestsellers" — top sellers per category
3. Seasonal context — month, weather, upcoming Egyptian holidays/events
4. Short-form video virality patterns — what kinds of products are currently going viral on Arabic TikTok/Reels (e.g., "satisfying" organization items, "wow-factor" kitchen gadgets, smart-home demos, beauty transformations)

Pick the TOP 3 trending themes for today, each from a DIFFERENT category if possible. This keeps the feed varied and the algorithm rewarding.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
STEP 2 — PRODUCT VALIDATION
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

For each trending theme, find ONE product that passes ALL of these:
1. Currently visible on amazon.eg with "Add to Cart" or "Buy Now" button
2. Not "Currently unavailable" or "Out of stock"
3. Sold by Amazon.eg directly OR by a seller with 90%+ positive rating
4. Price between 200–3000 EGP
5. Star rating 4.2 or above
6. Review count 100 or above
7. Has at least 2 clear product images
8. Not a consumable (no food, medicine, perishables, supplements)
9. NOT been promoted by us in the last 14 days (caller will provide exclusion list)
10. Visually demonstrable in 60 seconds — would look compelling in a vertical video

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
STEP 3 — RANK & RETURN
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Score each candidate by:
viral_score = trend_velocity × (commission_rate × price) × log(review_count) × visual_appeal

Return ONLY valid JSON array of the top 3 — no preamble, no markdown, raw JSON only.
If fewer than 3 products pass validation today, return only those that pass — never include an unavailable product.

Output schema:
[
  {
    "product_name": "",
    "product_name_arabic": "",
    "asin": "",
    "category": "",
    "trend_reason": "Why this is trending today — 1 sentence",
    "price_egp": 0,
    "commission_rate": 0.04,
    "estimated_commission_egp": 0,
    "star_rating": 0,
    "review_count": 0,
    "product_url": "https://www.amazon.eg/dp/[ASIN]",
    "affiliate_link": "https://www.amazon.eg/dp/[ASIN]?tag=[ASSOCIATE_ID]",
    "availability_status": "in_stock",
    "seller_type": "amazon_or_verified",
    "key_features": ["", "", ""],
    "problem_it_solves": "",
    "target_buyer_arabic": "",
    "image_urls": ["", ""],
    "viral_score": 0
  }
]
",
  "messages": [{"role":"user","content": "=Today is {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}. Multi-category trend mode is ACTIVE. Eligible categories: home-kitchen,electronics,beauty,sports-outdoors,toys-games,tools. Associate ID: pickeasy06-21.\n\nLive movers-and-shakers signal from amazon.eg (status: {{$json.status}}, count: {{$json.count}}):\n{{ JSON.stringify($json.trends) }}\n\nUsing this signal plus your reasoning about Egyptian short-form video trends today, return the top 3 validated, in-stock, viral-worthy products from DIFFERENT categories. Do not repeat ASINs posted in the last 14 days."}]
}

={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 3000,
  "system": "You are a viral Arabic short video scriptwriter for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. You write in Egyptian Arabic dialect (عامية مصرية). Your scripts feel like a genuine friend recommendation — never like an advertisement. Your hook must stop scrolling within 2 seconds.

Input format you receive:
{
  "product_name": "",
  "product_name_arabic": "",
  "price_egp": 0,
  "star_rating": 0,
  "review_count": 0,
  "key_features": [],
  "problem_it_solves": "",
  "target_buyer_arabic": "",
  "affiliate_link": ""
}

Return ONLY valid JSON. No preamble. Raw JSON only:
{
  "hook_arabic": "3-second opening line in Egyptian Arabic — bold question or surprising statement that stops scrolling",
  "script_arabic": "Full 58-second Egyptian Arabic voiceover. Structure: Hook 3s → Problem the product solves 8s → Product intro 8s → Feature 1 with benefit 10s → Feature 2 with benefit 10s → Feature 3 with benefit 8s → Social proof: mention star rating and review count naturally 6s → Price reveal 5s → CTA: الرابط في البايو 👇",
  "script_english": "Same structure in natural English for YouTube Shorts — not a direct translation",
  "text_overlays": [
    {"time_seconds": "0-3", "text": "", "style": "bold-center"},
    {"time_seconds": "3-15", "text": "", "style": "bottom-bar"},
    {"time_seconds": "15-30", "text": "", "style": "top-left"},
    {"time_seconds": "30-45", "text": "", "style": "bottom-bar"},
    {"time_seconds": "50-60", "text": "الرابط في البايو 👇", "style": "center-bold"}
  ],
  "caption_arabic": "2-line Arabic caption + line break + 10 Arabic hashtags relevant to product and niche",
  "caption_english": "2-line English caption + line break + 10 English hashtags",
  "youtube_title": "Product name + benefit + Arabic keyword — under 70 chars",
  "youtube_description": "English description 3 sentences + affiliate link + Arabic hashtags",
  "thumbnail_text_arabic": "Bold Arabic text for thumbnail — max 4 words — curiosity-driven",
  "elevenlabs_text": "Script Arabic with natural pauses marked as [pause] for pacing"
}
",
  "messages": [{"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify($json) }} }]
}

={
  "source": {
    "output_format": "mp4",
    "width": 1080,
    "height": 1920,
    "duration": 60,
    "frame_rate": 30,
    "fill_color": "#000000",
    "elements": [
      { "type": "image", "track": 1, "time": 0, "duration": 30, "fit": "cover", "source": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Script JSON').item.json.product.image_urls[0]) }}, "animations": [{"type":"scale","easing":"linear","start_scale":1.0,"end_scale":1.08,"duration":30}] },
      { "type": "image", "track": 1, "time": 30, "duration": 20, "fit": "cover", "source": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Script JSON').item.json.product.image_urls[1]) }} },
      { "type": "shape", "track": 2, "time": 50, "duration": 10, "width": "100%", "height": "100%", "fill_color": "#FF9900" },
      { "type": "text", "track": 3, "time": 0, "duration": 3, "y": "50%", "x": "50%", "x_anchor": "50%", "y_anchor": "50%", "width": "90%", "text": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Script JSON').item.json.script.text_overlays[0].text) }}, "font_family": "Cairo", "font_weight": "700", "font_size": "68 vmin", "fill_color": "#FFFFFF", "text_align": "center" },
      { "type": "text", "track": 3, "time": 3, "duration": 12, "y": "85%", "x": "50%", "x_anchor": "50%", "y_anchor": "100%", "width": "90%", "text": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Script JSON').item.json.script.text_overlays[1].text) }}, "font_family": "Cairo", "font_weight": "600", "font_size": "44 vmin", "fill_color": "#FFFFFF", "background_color": "rgba(0,0,0,0.6)", "padding": "16 vmin", "text_align": "center" },
      { "type": "text", "track": 3, "time": 15, "duration": 10, "y": "15%", "x": "50%", "x_anchor": "50%", "y_anchor": "0%", "width": "90%", "text": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Script JSON').item.json.script.text_overlays[2].text) }}, "font_family": "Cairo", "font_weight": "600", "font_size": "44 vmin", "fill_color": "#FFFFFF", "background_color": "rgba(0,0,0,0.6)", "padding": "16 vmin", "text_align": "center" },
      { "type": "text", "track": 3, "time": 25, "duration": 12, "y": "85%", "x": "50%", "x_anchor": "50%", "y_anchor": "100%", "width": "90%", "text": {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Script JSON').item.json.script.text_overlays[3].text) }}, "font_family": "Cairo", "font_weight": "600", "font_size": "44 vmin", "fill_color": "#FFFFFF", "background_color": "rgba(0,0,0,0.6)", "padding": "16 vmin", "text_align": "center" },
      { "type": "text", "track": 4, "time": 50, "duration": 10, "y": "40%", "x": "50%", "x_anchor": "50%", "y_anchor": "50%", "text": "={{$('Parse Script JSON').item.json.product.price_egp}} \u062c\u0646\u064a\u0647", "font_family": "Cairo", "font_weight": "700", "font_size": "52 vmin", "fill_color": "#000000", "text_align": "center" },
      { "type": "text", "track": 4, "time": 50, "duration": 10, "y": "60%", "x": "50%", "x_anchor": "50%", "y_anchor": "50%", "text": "\u0627\u0644\u0631\u0627\u0628\u0637 \u0641\u064a \u0627\u0644\u0628\u0627\u064a\u0648 \ud83d\udc47", "font_family": "Cairo", "font_weight": "700", "font_size": "48 vmin", "fill_color": "#000000", "text_align": "center" },
      { "type": "text", "track": 5, "time": 0, "duration": 60, "y": "95%", "x": "95%", "x_anchor": "100%", "y_anchor": "100%", "text": "PickEasy.eg", "font_family": "Roboto", "font_size": "24 vmin", "fill_color": "rgba(255,255,255,0.6)" },
      { "type": "audio", "track": 6, "time": 0, "duration": 60, "source": {{ JSON.stringify($json.audio_url) }}, "volume": 1.0 }
    ]
  }
}

parameters.subject: =🛒 PickEasy — {{$now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd')}} — {{ $items().length }} videos posted
parameters.message:
=

PickEasy.eg — Daily Report

{{$now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd')}}

Today's 3 Videos — Ready to Post

{{ $items().map(i => `

${i.json.product.product_name_arabic} — ${i.json.product.price_egp} EGP

Trend reason: ${i.json.product.trend_reason || 'N/A'}

📥 Download video   🔗 Affiliate link

Caption to copy:

TikTok: ${i.json.tiktok_status || 'manual upload'} · Instagram: ${i.json.instagram_status || 'manual upload'} · Est. commission: ${i.json.product.estimated_commission_egp} EGP

`).join('') }}

Total est. daily commission: {{ $items().reduce((s,i)=>s+i.json.product.estimated_commission_egp,0) }} EGP

📊 Open Google Sheet

✅ Stock validation: Bestseller-safety mode active. Upgrade to PA-API after first 3 qualifying sales — see pa-api-upgrade-guide.md

Your 10-minute Sunday review: open Google Sheet, flag winners, remove losers.

parameters.subject: =⚠️ PickEasy — No products found {{$now.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd')}}
parameters.message: Today's research returned 0 validated products. Check API keys, Claude prompt, or amazon.eg category availability.
